Organization and Description of Business The accompanying combined and consolidated financial statements include the combined and consolidated results of operations of Jefferson Capital, Inc., and its subsidiaries (the Company). Jefferson Capital, Inc. is a Delaware corporation headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota.
